summary: Completed comprehensive testing of P0 cold-start fix and full application. Backend pre-warming works perfectly: ES models load in background on startup (ready:true), ES backtests are sub-1s (GMM: 0.62s, HMM: 0.52s), no 502 timeouts. All backend endpoints (instruments, strategy info, model status, backtest, optimize, pine-script, runs, downloads) return 200. Frontend fully functional: dark terminal UI loads, single backtest populates all panels (Acceptance Scorecard, Test-Set Performance, Cost Attribution, Robustness/Overfitting, Equity Curve), all tabs render (Overview, Charts, Trades, Model), regime model toggle (HMM/GMM) works with correct badges and transition matrix display, drawdown method toggle (Anchored/Spec-exact) works, download Pine Script button present, walk-forward optimize starts and shows progress. Cold-start fix successfully eliminates gateway timeouts.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/instruments returns all 6 instruments with correct specs (ES, MES, MNQ, M2K, MGC, MCL)
Backend: GET /api/strategy/info returns strategy metadata (name, param_defaults, param_space, acceptance_criteria)
Backend: GET /api/model/status?symbol=ES returns ready:true (ES pre-warmed on startup)
Backend: POST /api/backtest/single (ES GMM) completes in 0.62s (pre-warmed, fast response)
Backend: POST /api/backtest/single (ES HMM) completes in 0.52s (pre-warmed, fast response)
Backend: POST /api/backtest/single (MGC HMM) completes in 0.49s (cold symbol, no timeout)
Backend: GET /api/pine-script returns Pine Script v6 file (text/plain, starts with '//@version=6')
Backend: POST /api/optimize/start returns job_id and queues optimization job
Backend: GET /api/optimize/status/{job_id} shows progress (5% after 3s, status: running)
Frontend: App loads with dark terminal UI (background: rgb(13, 14, 18))
Frontend: Run Panel visible with instrument selector (data-testid: run-panel-instrument-select)
Frontend: Regime Model toggle renders with HMM and GMM buttons (data-testid: run-panel-regime-hmm, run-panel-regime-gmm)
Frontend: Drawdown Method toggle renders with Anchored and Spec-exact buttons (data-testid: run-panel-dd-anchored, run-panel-dd-spec)
Frontend: Run Single Backtest button works (ES GMM), completes in ~2s, populates all panels
Frontend: Acceptance Scorecard populates with pass/fail checks (Sharpe > 1.0, Win Rate > 54%, etc.)
Frontend: Test-Set Performance metrics populate (Sharpe: 0.846, Max Drawdown: 1425.00%, Win Rate: 48.09%, Total Trades: 1229, etc.)
Frontend: Cost Attribution panel shows slippage and commission costs
Frontend: Robustness/Overfitting panel shows diagnostics (PBO, Deflated Sharpe, PSR, Sharpe CI, Bootstrap P-value)
Frontend: Equity Curve chart renders with data
Frontend: Charts tab renders multiple charts (Equity Curve, Drawdown, Monthly Returns)
Frontend: Trades tab renders trade table with Trade ID column
Frontend: Model tab shows GMM badge after GMM run (correct regime model)
Frontend: HMM regime model toggle works, runs backtest, shows HMM badge and Transition Matrix in Model tab
Frontend: Drawdown Method toggle works (Spec-exact), runs backtest successfully
Frontend: Download Pine Script button present (data-testid: run-panel-pine-download)
Frontend: Walk-Forward Optimize button starts optimization job, Progress Console shows progress events

success_percentage.integration: 100% (cold-start fix working, pre-warming successful, no timeouts)
